reviews.title: Subscription too expensive
reviews.content: The workout plans are great but the subscription is way too expensive compared to other fitness apps. I can't justify $9.99/month when there are similar apps for $4.99.
reviews.author: FitnessFan22

reviews.title: App crashes during workouts
reviews.content: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
reviews.author: YogaLover99

reviews.title: Great variety of workouts
reviews.content: I really like the variety of workout plans available. The trainers are motivating and the video quality is excellent. Would give 5 stars if there were more beginner-friendly options.
reviews.author: NewToFitness

reviews.title: Can't cancel subscription
reviews.content: I've been trying to cancel my subscription for 2 weeks. The cancel button in settings doesn't work, and customer support hasn't responded to my emails. This feels like a scam.
reviews.author: AngryUser123

reviews.title: Good but needs offline mode
reviews.content: The workouts are effective and I've seen results in 2 weeks. However, I often exercise in places with poor internet and the app is unusable without a connection. Please add offline downloads!
reviews.author: TravelFit

reviews.title: Audio out of sync with video
reviews.content: In several workouts the trainer's audio is 2-3 seconds behind the video. It makes it really hard to follow along. This happens on both WiFi and cellular data.
reviews.author: TechRunner

reviews.title: Perfect for home workouts
reviews.content: As a busy mom, this app is perfect. I can do 15-minute workouts while the baby naps. The home gym equipment needed is minimal. Love the weekly challenges!
reviews.author: BusyMomLife

reviews.title: Charged twice for subscription
reviews.content: I was charged twice for the annual subscription ($79.99 x 2). Customer support is non-existent. I've disputed the charge with Apple. DO NOT SUBSCRIBE until they fix their billing.
reviews.author: DoubleCharged

reviews.title: Needs more customization
reviews.content: The preset workout plans are fine but I wish I could create custom workouts or at least swap out exercises I don't like. Sometimes the recommended weights are way off for my fitness level.
reviews.author: CustomFitness

reviews.title: Calorie tracking integration needed
reviews.content: I track my calories in MyFitnessPal and wish this app would sync workout data there. Having to manually log everything is tedious. Otherwise great app with solid workouts.
reviews.author: DataDrivenFit

reviews.title: Workout timer freezes
reviews.content: The rest timer between sets keeps freezing. I'll think 30 seconds have passed and it's actually been 3 minutes. Makes interval training impossible. This bug has been there for months.
reviews.author: IntervalKing

reviews.title: Misleading free trial
reviews.content: The app says '7-day free trial' but it charged me immediately. When I tried to get a refund, I was told it was in the terms. Very misleading marketing. The workouts themselves are decent.
reviews.author: TrialTrap

reviews.title: Great results in 30 days
reviews.content: I've been using this app for 30 days and I can already see real results. The progressive overload system works well. The meal plan suggestions are a nice bonus too.
reviews.author: ResultsDriven

reviews.title: Needs better Apple Watch support
reviews.content: The Apple Watch app is basically useless. It only shows heart rate but doesn't track reps, sets, or rest time. I end up having to use my phone anyway, which defeats the purpose.
reviews.author: WatchUser

reviews.title: Video quality drops randomly
reviews.content: On a 100Mbps connection, the video quality still drops to what looks like 240p sometimes. Other streaming apps work fine. Seems like a CDN or encoding issue on their end.
reviews.author: QualityMatters

reviews.title: Cannot log in after update
reviews.content: After updating to 3.2.2 I can't log in anymore. It says 'authentication failed' even though my password is correct. Reset password link doesn't send any email. Was working fine before the update.
reviews.author: LockedOutUser

reviews.title: Social challenges keep me motivated
reviews.content: The weekly challenges with friends are the best feature. Seeing my friends' progress pushes me to not skip workouts. The leaderboard is addictive in the best way. Keep adding more challenge types!
reviews.author: SocialFitnessPro

reviews.title: No onboarding for beginners
reviews.content: First time opening the app and I was dumped straight into advanced workouts with no guidance. As a complete beginner I had no idea what to do. Needs a proper onboarding flow that asks about fitness level and goals.
reviews.author: LostBeginner

reviews.title: Search is terrible
reviews.content: Searching for 'yoga' returns random HIIT workouts. The search filters don't work — I filter by 'no equipment' and still get workouts that need dumbbells. How hard is it to make search actually filter results?
reviews.author: FrustratedSearcher

reviews.title: Too many notifications
reviews.content: I get 3-4 push notifications per day reminding me to work out. It's annoying and makes me want to turn them all off, but then I'd miss the challenge invites. Let me choose what notifications I receive instead of all-or-nothing.
reviews.author: NotificationOverload

reviews.title: Please add data export
reviews.content: I want to export my workout history to a CSV so I can analyze my progress in my own spreadsheet. There's no way to do this in the app. I've asked support twice and got no response. Please add a data export feature.
reviews.author: DataGeek

reviews.title: 整体不错但订阅太贵
reviews.content: 用了三个月，训练计划很专业，视频质量也不错。但是订阅价格比同类应用贵了不少，月费 ¥68 有点难以接受，希望能推出更便宜的入门套餐或者年费优惠。
reviews.author: 健身爱好者

reviews.title: La aplicación se cierra sola
reviews.content: Cada vez que intento ver un video de entrenamiento la aplicación se cierra después de unos minutos. He perdido mi progreso varias veces. Tengo un iPhone 13 con iOS 17.2. Por favor arreglen esto.
reviews.author: UsuarioFrustrado

reviews.title: Meditation feature is a game changer
reviews.content: The new meditation sessions added in 3.3.0 are fantastic. 10-minute guided sessions before bed have completely changed my sleep quality. Love that it's included in the subscription, not a separate purchase.
reviews.author: MindfulAthlete

reviews.title: Recovery workouts are excellent
reviews.content: After an injury I used the recovery and mobility workouts to ease back in. The instructor clearly explains modifications for each movement. Would love more post-injury specific programs though.
reviews.author: ComebackTrail

reviews.title: Crashes mid workout
reviews.content: Every time I start a workout video, the app crashes after about 5 minutes. This is so frustrating, I've lost my workout progress multiple times. iPhone 14, iOS 17.4.
reviews.author: AnotherYogi

reviews.title: Sleep tracking is inaccurate
reviews.content: The new sleep tracking in 3.3.0 says I only slept 4 hours when my Apple Health says 7.5 hours. It keeps logging me as awake whenever I move. The feature feels half-baked and rushed out.
reviews.author: SleepSkeptic

reviews.title: Wish I could share workouts
reviews.content: There's no way to share a workout with a friend who doesn't have the app. I want to send my favorite routine to my workout buddy but the only option is a generic 'invite' link. Add a proper share feature with workout preview.
reviews.author: ShareableFitness

reviews.title: App is slow to load
reviews.content: Takes 15-20 seconds to load the workout library every time I open the app. My internet is fine, other apps load instantly. Seems like the app re-downloads everything instead of caching. Makes me not want to open it.
reviews.author: ImpatientUser

reviews.title: Customer support never responds
reviews.content: I've emailed support three times about a billing error over the past month. Not a single response. The in-app help link just opens a useless FAQ page. Worst customer service I've experienced from any app.
reviews.author: IgnoredCustomer

reviews.title: Need family sharing plan
reviews.content: My partner and I both want to use this app but paying for two subscriptions is too expensive. Please add a family plan option — I'd happily pay 50% more for two accounts. Other apps have this, why not this one?
reviews.author: FamilyFitDuo

reviews.title: Not enough women-specific programs
reviews.content: Most programs seem designed for men. There are a few 'women's' workouts but they're mostly just lighter weights. Would love programs designed around menstrual cycle phases, pregnancy, and postpartum. Huge underserved market.
reviews.author: StrongWomanFit

reviews.title: Videos take up too much storage
reviews.content: The app is using 4.5GB on my phone after a month of use. There's no option to set a cache size limit or auto-clean old videos. Had to delete the app and reinstall to reclaim space. Add storage management!
reviews.author: StorageStruggle

reviews.title: Workout history sync broken
reviews.content: My workout history only shows the last 7 days on my iPad, but on my iPhone I can see everything. Cross-device sync is completely broken. I've tried logging out and back in, didn't help. Lost weeks of progress data.
reviews.author: SyncSufferer

reviews.title: Beautiful interface and smooth UX
reviews.content: The redesign in the latest version is gorgeous. Smooth animations, intuitive navigation, and the new dark mode is perfect for early morning workouts. This is what a premium fitness app should look like.
reviews.author: DesignLover
